'''zhafuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylo|xylo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylo|xylo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhafuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfithith|zhæfithith]] || [[word:zhæfithij|zhæfithij]] || [[word:zhæfithish|zhæfithish]] || [[word:zhæfithi|zhæfithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafufuthuth|zhafufuthuth]] || [[word:zhafufuthuj|zhafufuthuj]] || [[word:zhafufuthush|zhafufuthush]] || [[word:zhafufuthu|zhafufuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafuthuth|zhafuthuth]] || [[word:zhafuthuj|zhafuthuj]] || [[word:zhafuthush|zhafuthush]] || [[word:zhafuthu|zhafuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafufthuth|zhafufthuth]] || [[word:zhafufthuj|zhafufthuj]] || [[word:zhafufthush|zhafufthush]] || [[word:zhafufthuf|zhafufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafuthuthu|zhafuthuthu]] || [[word:zhafuthuju|zhafuthuju]] || [[word:zhafuthushu|zhafuthushu]] || [[word:zhafuthuku|zhafuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafuthuth|zhafuthuth]] || [[word:zhafuthuj|zhafuthuj]] || [[word:zhafuthush|zhafuthush]] || [[word:zhafuthu|zhafuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafuthuthul|zhafuthuthul]] || [[word:zhafuthujul|zhafuthujul]] || [[word:zhafuthushul|zhafuthushul]] || [[word:zhafuthukul|zhafuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafuthuthuthu|zhafuthuthuthu]] || [[word:zhafuthujuju|zhafuthujuju]] || [[word:zhafuthushushu|zhafuthushushu]] || [[word:zhafuthuku|zhafuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafuthuthun|zhafuthuthun]] || [[word:zhafuthujun|zhafuthujun]] || [[word:zhafuthushun|zhafuthushun]] || [[word:zhafuthukun|zhafuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafuthuthuoro|zhafuthuthuoro]] || [[word:zhafuthujuoro|zhafuthujuoro]] || [[word:zhafuthushuoro|zhafuthushuoro]] || [[word:zhafuthukuoro|zhafuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
